$comment: Plugins that expose an action/connector surface but have NO keyless (pr-deterministic) e2e scenario yet. This baseline is a RATCHET: it may only shrink. Add keyless coverage for a plugin and remove it here; never add a new entry to silence the gate. Regenerate the candidate set with `bun packages/scripts/e2e-coverage/check-e2e-coverage.ts --list-uncovered`.
